content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.35%, Bank Nifty -1.21%, PSU Bank -2%, IT weak. Energy and Metal showing relative strength. Book is 45% deployed with 7 positions, mostly small unrealized gains. With weak market breadth and a poor 5-day record (14% win rate, 0.4x profit factor), priority is position management and trailing SLs, not new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23950,
      "nifty_resistance": 24180
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1025.00,
      "new_target": 1095.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +5.8%. SL already at 1025 (above entry 984) which locks in ~4% gain — keeping it. Stock in strong uptrend post Q4 beat; daily candles show controlled consolidation near highs. Letting it run to 1095 target. No-op check: SL/target unchanged from current — actually treating this as HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL at 1025 already locks in ~4% gain. Thesis intact post Q4 beat. Hold for target 1095."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.9%, well above SL 119. Gold consolidating after run-up. Hold; SL at 119 limits further downside to ~3% from CMP."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1425.00,
      "new_target": 1465.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +1.5%. SL at 1425 already at breakeven+. CMP 1436.60 hitting fresh 52w high. Keep SL where it is; target 1465 within reach. No-op — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL at 1425 essentially at breakeven, position making fresh 52w highs on Q4 beat. Hold for 1465 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.4%, near 52w high. SL 402 just below entry 404.50. Power sector strong; Q4 results May 15 catalyst ahead. Holding — not yet at +2% threshold to trail. SL 402 limits downside."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "new_target": 1830.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +1% with SL at 1735 already locking in tiny gain above entry. Organon deal narrative still mixed (heavy debt taken on). Keep tight SL at 1735. No-op — using HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL at 1735 locks in marginal gain. Organon deal has integration/leverage concerns; tight SL appropriate. Let it run toward 1830."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.4%, intraday consolidation near 52w high. SL 315 gives ~1.4% downside cushion. Q4 results May 19 ahead. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.4%. Q4 beat but stock faded from intraday high 473.90 to 466.80. SL 463 limits downside to ~1%. Hold; thesis intact on dividend + capacity directive."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1025.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already trailed above entry (+4% locked). MACD bullish, near 52w high. Let it run toward 1095."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Small loss, well above SL. Gold consolidating; hold for now."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1425.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven+, fresh 52w highs. Hold for 1465 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 402.00,
      "reasoning": "Near 52w high but only +0.4% — not yet at +2% trigger to trail SL. Q4 results May 15 catalyst."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "reasoning": "SL just above entry locks in flat. Organon deal mixed; tight SL right call."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 315.00,
      "reasoning": "Small loss, defensive utility, near 52w high. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 463.00,
      "reasoning": "Small loss after Q4 beat fade. SL tight at 463 limits damage. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "VBL (+30% in April, Q1 beat) is interesting but stock is extended and FMCG-cluster overlap with NESTLEIND. ADANITOTALGAS, JSWENERGY, ONGC all near 52w highs with energy theme — but I already hold NTPC + POWERGRID + COALINDIA in the broader energy/utility cluster (~22% of book). Adding more energy/power names = correlation cluster risk per discipline rule. Will not stack. RKFORGE, AARTIIND, INTELLECT — momentum but no compelling RR at current levels. Re-evaluate VBL on a pullback to 480-490 zone.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 45% deployed across 7 positions, well-diversified across financials/FMCG/energy/pharma/metal/gold. Three OPEN orders (PHARMABEES, HINDZINC, TATAPOWER) are stale and have been working since prior session — TATAPOWER overlaps with my power cluster. Letting them sit at limit prices for now since they're below current market and won't fill in a weak tape; if they remain unfilled at next cycle, I'll cancel. 5-day performance (14% win rate, 0.4x profit factor) is poor — this argues strongly for NO new entries today and tighter discipline on exits. Weak Bank Nifty (-1.21%) and PSU Bank (-2%) confirms broad market caution. Daily loss limit barely touched (-0.03%); preserving capital is the right call."
}
